urdu transliteration text: Ay shimr zara kuch rehm to kha
english translation text: O Shimr! Have some mercy

urdu transliteration text:
Ye chhoti zehra hai
Masoom sakina hai
english translation text: This is a little Zahra,This is the innocent Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Na maar ise,
naazon se ise Shabbir ne paala hai
english translation text: Do not hit her, Hussain brought her up with so much love and care

urdu transliteration text:
Sajjad ki behna ko,
ghaazi ki bhatiji ko
english translation text: The sister of Sajjad, the niece of Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Maanga hai kanizi me,
us phool si bacchi ko
english translation text: They have asked for this innocent girl as a slave

urdu transliteration text:
Sheh ne apne, sajdon me jisse,
Allah se maanga hai
english translation text: The same one who Hussain prayed for in his salatul layl

urdu transliteration text:
Dorenge agar naaqe,
kis tarha se sambhlegi
english translation text: If the camel runs, how will she stabilise herself

urdu transliteration text:
Gar raah me gir jaaye,
aawaaz kisse degi
english translation text: If she falls on the road, who will she call

urdu transliteration text:
Pushte naaqa, par kyun tanha,
rassi se baandha hai
english translation text: Why have you tied her so awkwardly on the back of the camel

urdu transliteration text:
Kya jurm kiya isne,
kyun is ko rulaata hai
english translation text: What is her crime? Why do you make her cry?

urdu transliteration text:
Dikhla ke ise paani,
matti pe bahaata ha
english translation text: You taunt her by showing her water, then spill it on the floor

urdu transliteration text:
Kya teri koi, aulaad nahi,
kyun zulm ye dhaata hai
english translation text: Do you not have a family? Why do you oppress like this?

urdu transliteration text:
Rone na diya is ko,
baba ke laashe par
english translation text: You did not let her cry at her father’s grave

urdu transliteration text:
Hai neel tamaachon ke,
maasuma ke chehre per
english translation text: Her cheeks are red as a result of all the slaps!

urdu transliteration text:
Allah jaane, ye is pe sitam,
kis baat ka badla hai
english translation text: God only knows what they were avenging by hitting her

urdu transliteration text:
Ek raat sare zindaan,
shabbir ka sar aaya
english translation text: One night, in the prison, the head of Hussain was brought

urdu transliteration text:
Sar le kar godi me,
bacchi ne kiya nauha
english translation text: She took the head into her lap and wailed

urdu transliteration text:
Aankhein kholo, baba dekho,
ye kaun za'ifa hai
english translation text: Open your eyes, o Baba, look at my state!

urdu transliteration text:
Maasum ki gardan me,
baandhi hai rasan aise
english translation text: On this innocent child's neck, they have tied the rope so tight

urdu transliteration text:
Guth jaayega dam is ka,
mein tez chalun kaise
english translation text: She will lose her breath like this, how can I walk

urdu transliteration text:
Sajjad cries, walking with his back bent
Ye kehta huwa, bimaar mera,
kham ho kar chalta hai

Turbat pe sakina ki,
aabid ne kaha hoga
english translation text: Sajjad lamented at the grave of Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Ye meri amaanat hai,
rakhna tu khayaal iska
english translation text: This is my possession, take good care of her

urdu transliteration text:
Baba bhi nahi, ammu bhi nahi,
be aas yatima hai
english translation text: No father, no uncle, she is an orphan with no hope

urdu transliteration text:
Roze pe nazar jab bhi,
ay shadman jaati hai
english translation text: Whenever o Shadman we look at the grave of Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Phir qalbe takallum ko,
ye baat rulaati hai
english translation text: The heart of Takallum, cries when he thinks of this

urdu transliteration text:
Sadiyaan guzri, chhoti bibi,
zindaan me tanha hai
english translation text: Centuries have passed, this little girl is alone in her grave!
